response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "ParseCommand",
      "purpose": "Extract and validate the command field from the input JSON",
      "behavior": "Parse the input JSON to extract the 'command' field and validate it is one of the allowed commands (send, history, create_channel, join). Return the command and remaining payload.",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["JSON parsing", "command validation"], "out_of_scope": ["executing the command", "data store access"]},
      "preconditions": ["Input is valid JSON"],
      "postconditions": ["Command is one of the allowed values"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if command is missing or invalid"],
      "composition_role": "transform",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "Any", "description": "Raw JSON input from parent", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [],
      "outputs": [{"name": "command", "type": "str", "description": "Validated command string", "consumer": "parent"}, {"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Remaining JSON fields after command extraction", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def ParseCommand(input: Any) -> tuple[str, dict]",
      "global_vars": [],
      "data_operations": [],
      "requested_capabilities": [],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "Command must be one of: send, history, create_channel, join"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "Valid JSON with command field returns command and payload"}, {"ac_id": "AC-002", "description": "Invalid JSON returns error"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "SendMessage",
      "purpose": "Handle sending a message to a channel",
      "behavior": "Validate that the user is a member of the specified channel, then store the message in the messages data store with timestamp and user info.",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["message validation", "channel membership check", "message storage"], "out_of_scope": ["command parsing", "history retrieval"]},
      "preconditions": ["User is member of the channel", "Message content is non-empty"],
      "postconditions": ["Message is stored in messages data store"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if user not in channel"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel, user, and message content", "source": "parent input (from ParseCommand)"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read", "reason": "Check if user is a member of the channel"}, {"resource": "messages", "op": "write", "reason": "Store the new message with timestamp and user info"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Success or error response", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def SendMessage(payload: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "channels", "op": "read", "description": "Check user membership in channel"}, {"variable": "messages", "op": "write", "description": "Store new message"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "channels", "operation_type": "read", "description": "Check if user is a member of the channel"}, {"source_name": "messages", "operation_type": "write", "description": "Store the new message with timestamp and user info"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["channels.read", "messages.write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-002", "description": "User must be a member of the channel to send messages"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-003", "description": "Message stored when user is member"}, {"ac_id": "AC-004", "description": "Error returned when user not in channel"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-002"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetHistory",
      "purpose": "Retrieve message history for a channel",
      "behavior": "Validate that the user is a member of the channel, then fetch the last 100 messages from the messages data store for that channel, ordered by timestamp.",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["channel membership check", "message retrieval", "limit enforcement"], "out_of_scope": ["message sending", "channel creation"]},
      "preconditions": ["User is member of the channel"],
      "postconditions": ["Returns at most 100 messages"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if user not in channel"],
      "composition_role": "query",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel and user", "source": "parent input (from ParseCommand)"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read", "reason": "Check if user is a member of the channel"}, {"resource": "messages", "op": "read", "reason": "Fetch last 100 messages for the channel"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "List of messages or error", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def GetHistory(payload: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "channels", "op": "read", "description": "Check user membership in channel"}, {"variable": "messages", "op": "read", "description": "Fetch last 100 messages for the channel"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "channels", "operation_type": "read", "description": "Check if user is a member of the channel"}, {"source_name": "messages", "operation_type": "read", "description": "Fetch last 100 messages for the channel"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["channels.read", "messages.read"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-003", "description": "User must be a member of the channel to view history"}, {"constraint_id": "C-004", "description": "Maximum 100 messages returned"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-005", "description": "Messages returned when user is member"}, {"ac_id": "AC-006", "description": "Error returned when user not in channel"}, {"ac_id": "AC-007", "description": "At most 100 messages returned"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-003"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CreateChannel",
      "purpose": "Create a new channel",
      "behavior": "Check that the channel name does not already exist, then create a new channel entry in the channels data store with the creator as the first member.",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["channel name uniqueness check", "channel creation", "initial membership"], "out_of_scope": ["joining existing channels", "message operations"]},
      "preconditions": ["Channel name does not already exist"],
      "postconditions": ["Channel is created and creator is added as member"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if channel already exists"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel name and creator user", "source": "parent input (from ParseCommand)"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read_write", "reason": "Check uniqueness and create new channel entry"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Success or error response", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def CreateChannel(payload: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "channels", "op": "read_write", "description": "Check uniqueness and create new channel entry"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "channels", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Check uniqueness and create new channel entry"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["channels.read_write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-005", "description": "Channel name must be unique"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-008", "description": "Channel created when name is unique"}, {"ac_id": "AC-009", "description": "Error returned when channel already exists"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-004"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "JoinChannel",
      "purpose": "Add a user to an existing channel",
      "behavior": "Check that the channel exists and the user is not already a member, then add the user to the channel's member list in the channels data store.",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["channel existence check", "duplicate membership check", "membership update"], "out_of_scope": ["channel creation", "message operations"]},
      "preconditions": ["Channel exists", "User is not already a member"],
      "postconditions": ["User is added to channel's member list"],
      "guarantees": ["Returns error if channel does not exist or user already member"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "payload", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel name and user", "source": "parent input (from ParseCommand)"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read_write", "reason": "Check existence and membership, then update member list"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Success or error response", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def JoinChannel(payload: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "channels", "op": "read_write", "description": "Check existence and membership, then update member list"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "channels", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Check existence and membership, then update member list"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["channels.read_write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-006", "description": "Channel must exist to join"}, {"constraint_id": "C-007", "description": "User must not already be a member"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-010", "description": "User added to channel when channel exists and user not already member"}, {"ac_id": "AC-011", "description": "Error returned when channel does not exist"}, {"ac_id": "AC-012", "description": "Error returned when user already member"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-005"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }

  "governance_notes": "All children preserve Stage 1 semantics and Stage 2 interfaces exactly. ParseCommand has no data store access (pure function). ParseCommand has no internal_leaf_accesses, so global_vars and data_operations are empty.",
